crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority task.

crons.name: vault-agent-log-sync
crons.prompt: Run /Users/loganbronstein/cortextos/orgs/cortex/agents/scribe/scripts/vault-sync-agent-logs.sh silently. It mirrors redacted runtime logs for boss, analyst, coder, marketing, and scribe into Vault/Research/cortextos/_agent-logs/. Do NOT send Telegram. Append one line to today's scribe memory with the updated stream count, then end your turn.

crons.name: vault-chat-transcript-sync
crons.prompt: Run node /Users/loganbronstein/cortextos/orgs/cortex/agents/scribe/scripts/vault-sync-chat-transcripts.mjs silently. It mirrors redacted Claude, Codex, Cortex task-audit, and Cortex agent-message transcript sources into Vault/Research/cortextos/transcripts/. Do NOT send Telegram. Append one line to today's scribe memory with the mirrored file count, then end your turn.

crons.name: chat-research-synthesis
crons.prompt: Run node /Users/loganbronstein/cortextos/orgs/cortex/agents/scribe/scripts/vault-synthesize-chat-research.mjs silently after transcript sync. It creates a source-linked research paper at Vault/Research/cortextos/chat-research/YYYY-MM-DD.md from recent transcript archive notes. Do NOT send Telegram unless it finds a critical blocker.

crons.name: lazy-obsidian-daily-ingest
crons.prompt: Run cortextos bus vault lazy --skip-graphify silently. This is Logan's canonical Lazy Obsidian Method daily ingest: capture raw chats/logs, process them into source-linked research, route useful claims to natural Obsidian domains, refresh wikilinks, and write Vault/Reports/lazy-obsidian/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Do NOT send Telegram unless the run fails.

crons.name: lazy-obsidian-nightly-review
crons.prompt: Run cortextos bus vault lazy --skip-graphify silently, then run cortextos bus vault lint. This is the nightly review layer: daily notes, lessons, agent logs, and memory get refreshed into dashboards, route queues, and memory-health reports. Do NOT send Telegram unless a critical blocker exists.

crons.name: lazy-obsidian-weekly-vault
crons.prompt: Run cortextos bus vault lazy --sync-all silently, then run cortextos bus vault lint. This is the weekly vault layer: full transcript/log backfill, Graphify cluster refresh, QMD verification, topic gaps, and next-step items. Do NOT send Telegram unless the weekly run fails.

crons.name: daily-memory-brief
crons.prompt: Create today's Cortex daily memory brief at /Users/loganbronstein/Sale Advisor/Vault/Daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md. Read the last 24h of task status, agent heartbeats, scribe conflict reports, promote queue, and redacted agent-log ledger. Include: what each of the five agents did, what is pending, what is blocked, what Logan needs to see, and the exact files created or changed. Update /Users/loganbronstein/Sale Advisor/Vault/State/Fleet.md if fleet state changed. Do NOT send Telegram unless a critical blocker exists.

crons.name: conflict-scan
crons.prompt: Run a cross-fleet memory conflict scan. Compare all five agent MEMORY.md files, yesterday/today daily memory files, Vault/Decisions/Open.md, Vault/Cortex Index.md, and Vault/State/Fleet.md. Write findings to Vault/Reports/scribe-conflict-scan/YYYY-MM-DD.md with concrete source paths. Surface only real contradictions, stale goals, missing links, or decisions not represented in Decisions/Open.

crons.name: cortex-index-refresh
crons.prompt: Refresh Vault/Cortex Index.md and Vault/State/Fleet.md for newly created scribe outputs, agent-log ledgers, daily briefs, conflict scans, onboarding kits, and memory health reports. Keep links current, remove stale 4-agent wording, and do not rewrite script-owned Daily Notes message blocks.
